SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain

Class RealTimeOptimizationLoop

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain.RealTimeOptimizationLoop
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RealTimeOptimizationLoop extends Object implements Serializable
Orchestrates a closed-loop real-time optimization (RTO) cycle.

Real-time optimization closes the loop between the plant and its model: read current measurements, reconcile/calibrate the model against them, optimize the setpoints on the calibrated model, then push the new setpoints back to the plant. This class wires those steps together as pluggable functional stages and runs them for a configured number of cycles, keeping an auditable record of each cycle (measurements, chosen setpoints, achieved objective).

Each stage is supplied by the caller so the loop is agnostic to the data source and the optimizer: the reader typically wraps tagreader historian access, the calibrator wraps a data-reconciliation step, the optimizer wraps AgenticProcessOptimizer or NetworkAllocationOptimizer, and the writer pushes setpoints through ProcessAutomation (or a control-system bridge). The reader, calibrator and objective probe are optional; the optimizer and writer are required.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.Calibrator
    Stage that calibrates the model to the latest measurements.
    static class 
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.CycleRecord
    Immutable record of one executed RTO cycle.
    static interface 
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.ObjectiveProbe
    Stage that probes the achieved objective after setpoints are applied.
    static interface 
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.PlantReader
    Stage that reads current plant measurements.
    static interface 
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.SetpointOptimizer
    Stage that computes new setpoints from the calibrated model.
    static interface 
    RealTimeOptimizationLoop.SetpointWriter
    Stage that pushes setpoints to the plant.

    • setReader

      public RealTimeOptimizationLoop setReader(RealTimeOptimizationLoop.PlantReader reader)
      Sets the optional plant-measurement reader stage.
      Parameters:
      reader - the reader stage (may be null)
      Returns:
      this loop for method chaining

    • setCalibrator

      public RealTimeOptimizationLoop setCalibrator(RealTimeOptimizationLoop.Calibrator calibrator)
      Sets the optional model-calibration stage.
      Parameters:
      calibrator - the calibrator stage (may be null)
      Returns:
      this loop for method chaining

    • setOptimizer

      public RealTimeOptimizationLoop setOptimizer(RealTimeOptimizationLoop.SetpointOptimizer optimizer)
      Sets the required setpoint-optimizer stage.
      Parameters:
      optimizer - the optimizer stage (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this loop for method chaining

    • setWriter

      public RealTimeOptimizationLoop setWriter(RealTimeOptimizationLoop.SetpointWriter writer)
      Sets the required setpoint-writer stage.
      Parameters:
      writer - the writer stage (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this loop for method chaining

    • setObjectiveProbe

      public RealTimeOptimizationLoop setObjectiveProbe(RealTimeOptimizationLoop.ObjectiveProbe probe)
      Sets the optional objective-probe stage.
      Parameters:
      probe - the probe stage (may be null)
      Returns:
      this loop for method chaining

    • run

      public List<RealTimeOptimizationLoop.CycleRecord> run(int cycles)
      Runs the closed-loop optimization for the requested number of cycles.

      Each cycle reads measurements (if a reader is set), calibrates the model (if a calibrator is set), computes new setpoints, applies them, probes the achieved objective (if a probe is set), and records the cycle. The full cycle history is retained and also returned.

      Parameters:
      cycles - the number of cycles to run (must be positive)
      Returns:
      the list of executed cycle records

    • getHistory

      public List<RealTimeOptimizationLoop.CycleRecord> getHistory()
      Gets the history of executed cycles.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of cycle records

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Renders the cycle history as a JSON object.
      Returns:
      a JSON string describing the executed cycles

    • fmt

      private static String fmt(double value)
      Formats a double for JSON output, mapping non-finite values to null.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to format
      Returns:
      the formatted string or null
